note: 121.55(1) enumerates methods ('School boards may provide transportation by any of the following methods') including contracts with common carriers, but is silent on max term, rebid, or renewal. 120.12(24)(a) sealed-bid mandate is limited to 'group health care benefits provider' selection - not transportation. 66.0901 reaches only 'public contracts' for construction/public works or supplies/materials 'required to be advertised for by law' - transportation services are outside that scope. All three official Wisconsin Legislature pages re-opened and confirmed.
